title.en: Self Tapping Screws Complete Classification Guide
title.zh: 自攻螺丝完整分类指南

title.ar: دليل تصنيف البراغي ذات التapping الذاتي الكامل
title.fr: Guide complet de classification des vis taraudeuses
title.pt: Guia completo de classificação de parafusos autoatarrachantes
title.ru: Полное руководство по классификации самосверлящих шурупов
title.ja: ドリルねじ完全分類ガイド
title.hi: सेल्फ टैपिंग स्क्रू पूर्ण वर्गीकरण गाइड

description.en: Complete guide to self tapping screws: 304 stainless, galvanized, pan head, drill tail, washer head, hex head types. Factory wholesale prices for construction and industrial applications.
description.zh: 自攻螺丝完整指南：304不锈钢、镀锌、盘头、钻尾、外墙保温自攻螺丝。工厂批发价。

keywords: 304 cross head self tapping screw wholesale, 316 pan head self tapping screw, galvanized drywall screw factory stock, self tapping screw for exterior wall insulation, drill tail screw for color steel roof, anti slip washer head self tapping screw, hex head self locking tapping screw, high strength carbon steel self tapping screw

body.en: Self tapping screws (also called thread-forming or thread-cutting screws) create their own mating thread in the母材 as they are installed—no pre-drilling or tapping required. There are two main types: Thread-forming screws (Type AB, Type B, Type BF) displace母材 material as they enter, creating threads in ductile materials like sheet metal, plastics, and thin aluminum. These require a pilot hole but form a tight thread lock. Thread-cutting screws (Type C, Type D, Type F) actually cut threads using a fluted tip that clears chips, making them ideal for harder母材 or through multiple layers. Our comprehensive range includes cross head (Phillips/pozidriv), pan head, washer head, and hex head self-tapping screws in both 304/316 stainless steel and carbon steel zinc plated.
body.zh: 自攻螺丝在安装时在母材中创建自己的配合螺纹，无需预钻或攻丝。

heading.en: 304 Stainless vs Carbon Steel Self Tapping Screws

body.en: 304 stainless steel self tapping screws provide excellent corrosion resistance for outdoor, marine, and chemical environments. The addition of 18% chromium creates a passive oxide layer that self-repairs in oxygenated environments. For coastal construction, swimming pools, or chemical plant applications, specify 316 stainless which adds 2-3% molybdenum specifically to combat chloride attack. Carbon steel self tapping screws with zinc plating (typically 5-8 microns) are suitable for indoor applications or temporary structures where cost is the primary driver. HDG (hot-dip galvanized) carbon steel offers improved outdoor life at moderate cost. Always match the screw material to the母材 to prevent galvanic corrosion—stainless screws with aluminum母材, or zinc-plated screws with steel.
body.zh: 304不锈钢自攻螺丝为户外、海洋和化学环境提供优异的耐腐蚀性。

heading.en: Pan Head vs Washer Head Self Tapping Screws

body.en: Pan head self tapping screws have a low rounded head with a large bearing surface, making them ideal for attaching thin sheet metal or plastic components where a flush fit is needed. The washer head (also called EPDM face screw or bonded seal screw) features an integrated rubber washer (typically EPDM) that creates a weatherproof seal at the screw head—critical for metal roofing, wall cladding, and exterior insulation board applications. Anti slip washer head screws have a serrated washer face that bites into the母材 surface to prevent loosening from vibration. Hex head self tapping screws (also called hex washer head) accept standard hex wrenches for high-torque installation and are common in roofing and siding applications.
body.zh: 盘头自攻螺丝具有低圆形头部和大支撑面，适合固定薄金属板或塑料部件。

heading.en: Self Tapping Screws for Exterior Wall Insulation and Color Steel Roof

body.en: For exterior wall insulation systems (EIFS, ETICS), specialized long self tapping screws with large plastic disc washers (insulation retainers) are used to attach insulation boards to the substrate. The plastic disc (typically 50-60mm diameter) distributes load across the insulation without creating a thermal bridge. Drill tail screws (self drilling screws with extended drill flute) are designed for color steel roof and wall panel installations where the screw must penetrate through both the color steel sheet and any underlying insulation or purlin. The extended drill point (available in #2, #3, #4 drill capacities) ensures clean penetration without damaging the panel coating. EPDM bonded washers are essential for weather sealing in both applications.
body.zh: 对于外墙保温系统（EIFS, ETICS），专用长自攻螺丝配合大塑料垫圈用于将保温板固定到基层。

heading.en: Self Locking and High Strength Self Tapping Screws

body.en: Self locking tapping screws feature a serrated thread or flange design that provides additional resistance to loosening from vibration. The hex head self locking variant combines the high-torque drive capability of hex with locking thread features—common in automotive underbody panels and structural framing. High strength carbon steel self tapping screws in Grade 8.8 or 10.9 equivalent are used where the screw itself must withstand high shear and tensile loads—not just fasten two pieces together but also carry structural load. These are common in solar panel mounting rails and industrial equipment brackets where the fastener is a structural element, not just a connector.
body.zh: 自锁攻丝螺丝具有锯齿螺纹或法兰设计，提供额外的抗振动松动阻力。

q.en: What is the difference between self tapping and self drilling screws?
q.zh: 自攻螺丝和自钻螺丝有什么区别？

a.en: Self tapping screws require a pre-drilled pilot hole; the screw only forms threads. Self drilling screws have a built-in drill tip that creates the pilot hole AND forms threads in one step.
a.zh: 自攻螺丝需要预钻导孔；螺丝只形成螺纹。自钻螺丝有内置钻头，一步完成导孔和螺纹。

q.en: What EPDM washer size for color steel roofing screws?
q.zh: 彩钢屋面螺丝用多大EPDM垫圈？

a.en: Standard EPDM washer for roofing is 15mm ID × 4mm thick × 35mm OD for M6 screws. For larger screws or insulation applications, 50-60mm OD washers are used.
a.zh: 屋面标准EPDM垫圈是15mm内径×4mm厚×35mm外径，用于M6螺丝。
